name: product
title: Product
description: Compound Product primitives (Root, Title, Subtitle, Description, Price, Options, OptionButton) over a Medusa StoreProduct. URL-driven variant selection (?v= links), inventory-aware option availability (manage_inventory/inventory_quantity), currency-aware price with sale strikethrough, sanitized {@html} description. Pure resolution logic in product-logic.ts; no $effect (SSR-safe). Fetch the product reactively in your route and pass it in.

files.content: {@render children()}
{ctx.product?.title}

{#if ctx.product?.subtitle}

{ctx.product.subtitle}

{/if}
{@html html}
{formatPrice(price, locale)} {#if onSale} {formatPrice({ ...price, calculated_amount: price?.original_amount }, locale)} {/if}
{@render children()}

{option.title}

{#each option.values ?? [] as value (value.id)} {@const selected = ctx.isSelected(value.id)} {@const available = ctx.isAvailable(value.id)} {#if selected} {value.value} {:else if available} {value.value} {:else} {value.value} {/if} {/each}

import Root from './product.svelte'
import Title from './product-title.svelte'
import Subtitle from './product-subtitle.svelte'
import Description from './product-description.svelte'
import Price from './product-price.svelte'
import Options from './product-options.svelte'
import OptionButton from './product-option-button.svelte'

export { Root, Title, Subtitle, Description, Price, Options, OptionButton }
export { getProductContext, setProductContext } from './ctx.svelte.js'
export type { ProductContext } from './ctx.svelte.js'
export { formatPrice } from './format-price.js'
export * as logic from './product-logic.js'
